_source: Narrative system design §4. Phase 1 sprint scaffold: 1 quote per role-mood cell = 18 quotes total. Content expansion to ~10 per cell happens in Phase 3 during CharacterPhasePanel integration.
_note: Species personality flavor is applied as an optional substitution by AdvisorSystem.generate_quote() based on the advisor's species. The base quote is the fallback.

positive: I know someone who deals in these. Could be worth triple on the right world.
warning: Those markings are Unity military. Could be trouble.

positive: Patch jobs hold. They'll be back on their feet by morning.
warning: That wound is going to fester if we don't get supplies soon.

positive: Good fight. They won't be coming back.
warning: We are outnumbered. But that has never stopped us before.

positive: Interface looks clean. We can work with this.
warning: This system is failing. Cascade is going to take everything if we don't isolate it.
neutral: Specs are within tolerance. Nothing remarkable.

positive: Tracks lead the way we want. Whoever was here, they're long gone.
warning: Something has been watching us for a while. I do not like it.
neutral: Terrain is what we expected. No surprises.

positive: They like us. That is rarer than it sounds.
warning: He's playing a long game. Whatever this is, it's personal — and that makes him predictable.
neutral: Talk is cheap. Let's hear what they actually want.
